title: Reusable Animation Story Workflow With Storyboard
sourceTitle: East Asian Lantern Festival Storyboard Workflow AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable animation story workflow with storyboard-style sequence logic with consistent character identity, stable setting, and readable motion beats. character-consistent animated short planning board. one clear reference strip plus a small set of large storyboard frames. readable scene labels only, no tiny paragraphs. cinematic 3D fantasy animation look Story Premise: a quiet girl who becomes invisible to the crowd until she follows a trail of glowing lanterns. Character Sheet: large clean reference strip with front view, side view, three expressions, and one recurring lantern prop. World Setting: East Asian lantern festival at night with warm paper lights, wet stone paths, and fantasy haze. Scene Sequence: six to eight large storyboard panels total, moving from isolation to lantern discovery to reveal to emotional closure. Animation Style: premium 3D fantasy animation with soft cinematic camera moves and expressive body language. Consistency Rule: reuse the same character sheet for every storyboard and every animated shot. Subject: Make the recurring story character and location sheet that anchors every storyboard frame the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in East Asian lantern festival at night with warm paper lights, wet stone paths, and fantasy haze. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use a large-format animation preproduction board: one character-reference strip, one location reference row, and 6 to 8 large storyboard panels maximum. Avoid tiny contact-sheet grids, microscopic notes, and dozens of thumbnails. Style and Rendering: Render in premium 3D fantasy animation with soft cinematic camera moves and expressive body language. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the story-world color script implied by each scene, kept consistent across the full sequence. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: East Asian Lantern Festival Storyboard Workflow Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable animation story workflow with storyboard-style sequence logic with consistent character identity, stable setting, and readable motion beats. character-consistent animated short planning board. one clear reference strip plus a small set of large storyboard frames. readable scene labels only, no tiny paragraphs. cinematic 3D fantasy animation look Story Premise: a shy apprentice mapmaker finds that the city rearranges itself when nobody is watching. Character Sheet: large clean reference strip with front view, side view, three expressions, and one recurring lantern prop. World Setting: rainy old-town night market with floating street signs, glowing shop windows, and impossible alleys. Scene Sequence: six to eight large storyboard panels total, moving from isolation to lantern discovery to reveal to emotional closure. Animation Style: high-end stylized 3D short film, gentle fantasy realism, polished lighting. Consistency Rule: lock face shape, outfit colors, prop design, and landmark language across all shots. Subject: Make the recurring story character and location sheet that anchors every storyboard frame the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in rainy old-town night market with floating street signs, glowing shop windows, and impossible alleys. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use a large-format animation preproduction board: one character-reference strip, one location reference row, and 6 to 8 large storyboard panels maximum. Avoid tiny contact-sheet grids, microscopic notes, and dozens of thumbnails. Style and Rendering: Render in high-end stylized 3D short film, gentle fantasy realism, polished lighting. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the story-world color script implied by each scene, kept consistent across the full sequence. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
